crop Phase 6 edge case fixture
Document Cards Full page iframe and shadow Adjust Edge scroll Large wrapper Large element
Fixed marker

Phase 6 quality and edge case coverage

General document content

This block provides simple headings, paragraphs, links, and inline text for normal hover and click selection smoke. It should remain selectable at browser zoom 80, 100, 125, and 150 percent.

Jump to cards | Jump to code

Card UI

Primary card

Tests rectangular card hover boundaries and Copy output.

Secondary card

Tests adjacent card selection without leaking to siblings.

Card with actions

Tests nested button hit targets inside a card.

Dense button and icon area

A B

Code block

const state = {
  fixture: "phase6",
  zoomTargets: [80, 100, 125, 150],
  actions: ["Copy", "Save"],
};

function cropVisibleViewport(rect, viewport) {
  return {
    x: Math.max(rect.x, viewport.x),
    y: Math.max(rect.y, viewport.y),
    width: Math.min(rect.right, viewport.right) - Math.max(rect.x, viewport.x),
    height: Math.min(rect.bottom, viewport.bottom) - Math.max(rect.y, viewport.y),
  };
}

Long table

Case Target Expected Risk
01HeadingStable hoverLow
02CardSibling isolationLow
03ButtonNested targetLow
04CodeMonospace blockLow
05TableCell boundariesMedium
06StickyScroll alignmentMedium
07TransformBounding rectMedium
08iframeSame-origin targetHigh
09shadowOpen shadow traversalMedium
10OffscreenVisible clippingHigh

Transform and scale

CSS transform target. The overlay should use the visual bounding box returned by the browser, not the untransformed layout box.

Full page capture smoke area

Full page top marker Visible in the first stitched tile.
Middle seam marker for checking tile joins across scroll boundaries.
Horizontal overflow marker for right-side tile planning.
Bottom partial tile marker for the final stitched segment.

iframe and open shadow DOM

Selected adjustment smoke area

Resize and move target

Click this panel, drag inside the selected outline to move it, drag the corner or edge handles to resize it, then use Arrow, Shift+Arrow, and Alt/Option+Arrow keyboard adjustment.

Small target for size badge hiding checks.
Edge-adjacent target for action box clamp checks.

Edge auto-scroll smoke area

Start a drag selection from the left marker, keep the pointer near the bottom or top viewport edge for vertical edge auto-scroll, then keep it near the right or left viewport edge for horizontal edge auto-scroll. Verify pointerup stops scrolling, and Escape or Cancel leaves no scroll loop behind.

Drag start Right edge target
Bottom edge target for vertical auto-scroll smoke.

Large element continuing outside the visible viewport

This element intentionally extends past the right side of the viewport. MVP capture should save only the visible viewport intersection even if the selection outline shows the full element.

Too-large wrapper auto-select policy

The outer wrapper is intentionally wider and taller than the automatic selection threshold. Hovering the empty wrapper area should not create a clipped viewport-sized candidate, while the inner table and card remain normal selection targets.

ItemLarge wrapper
StatusInner table should select
RiskWrapper fallback should stay off
Inner content card

This card is a normal candidate inside the large wrapper and should continue to produce a stable automatic selection rect.

Scroll tail

Extra vertical space for sticky header and scroll alignment checks.
